title: enigmaticlegacy_X_epic_fight
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the Enigmatic Legacy weapons
body:
I animated some of the weapons in the Enigmatic Legacy mod for the Epic fight mod

- Note!!! Required Items:
1. Enigmatic Legacy:[https://modrinth.com/mod/enigmatic-legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/enigmatic-legacy)
2. Epic Fight:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
